name: ActivityFeeStJoeMatchPercent

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[TMP_ActivityFeeStJoeMatchPercentOutput];WITH cte1 AS (SELECT 'Totals and Match Percent:' AS Constant, CAST(INVOICE_QTY AS INT) AS INVOICE_QTY, CAST(TABLE_QTY AS INT) AS TABLE_QTY FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[TMP_ActivityFeeStJoeMatchPercent]), cte2 AS (SELECT Constant, SUM(INVOICE_QTY) AS Invoice_Act_Mbr_Total, SUM(TABLE_QTY) AS EDW_Act_Mbr_Total FROM cte1 GROUP BY Constant), cte3 AS (SELECT cte2.Constant, ' ' AS Filler1, ' ' AS Filler2, ' ' AS Filler3, ' ' AS Filler4, CAST(cte2.Invoice_Act_Mbr_Total AS INT) AS Invoice_Act_Mbr_Total, CAST(cte2.EDW_Act_Mbr_Total AS INT) AS EDW_Act_Mbr_Total, ((cte2.EDW_Act_Mbr_Total*1.0 / cte2.Invoice_Act_Mbr_Total) * 100) AS Match_Percent FROM cte2) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[TMP_ActivityFeeStJoeMatchPercentOutput] FROM cte3

Description:
Â© Copyright 2020  Blue Cross/Blue Shield of Kansas City

ZENA JOBNAME:  OPTUM_EDW_ACTIVITY_FEE_ANALYSIS_REPORT_MONTHLY_000

CONTROL JOB:  EdwActivityFeeRptCntl

JOB NAME:  ActivityFeeStJoeMatchPercent

Description:  This job reads the output file from job ActivityFeeStJoeMatchCheck.  It adds the all the active members from the INVOICE_QTY and TABLE_QTY columns to compute the totals.  It uses those totals to compute the match percentage at the member level.  This row gets appended the same file to complete the ActivityFeeStJoeMatchCheck report.
